calendar.matters:
ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-30-2017 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Oct-26-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-02-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Re Punitive Damages
Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jason M. Rose of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Tyrone Adams

RULING:
DEFENDANT BORGWARNER MORSE TEC INC., AS SUCCESSOR-BY-MERGER TO BORG-WARNER CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE PUNITIVE DAMAGES

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant BorgWarner Morse Tec Inc. as successor-by-merger to Borg-Warner Corporation's motion for summary adjudication re: punitive damages is denied as untimely. Defendant failed to provide proper notice pursuant to C.C.P. sections 437c(a), 1010.6, 12a and 12c. Plaintiff's objection based on timeliness is sustained. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Cathy Meyer of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #11596 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)

DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2015 Set For Trial On Apr-25-16 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 503
